name: TCI Express Limited
summary: TCI Express Limited provides express delivery solutions in India and internationally. The company provides services, including surface express; reverse express; domestic and international air express; and e-commerce express for the automotive, pharmaceutical, retail, engineering, apparel, e-commerce, and other industries. It has approximately 40,000 pickup and delivery points with approximately 5,000 containerized vehicles. The company was formerly known as TCI Properties (Pune) Limited. TCI Express Limited was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Gurugram, India.
